recommendations.title: Royalteen: Princess Margrethe
recommendations.overview: In the wake of her prom scandal, Princess Margrethe longs for normalcy as she struggles to maintain her perfect facade while dealing with family drama.

recommendations.title: Suncoast
recommendations.overview: While caring for her brother along with her audacious mother, a teenager strikes up an unlikely friendship with an eccentric activist who is protesting one of the most landmark medical cases of all time.

recommendations.title: A Matador's Mistress
recommendations.overview: Scandal erupts over a famous bullfighter's affair with a left-wing actress.

recommendations.title: The French Kissers
recommendations.overview: An awkward adolescent boy and his angst-ridden friends try their best to fit in amongst a cast of varied characters.

recommendations.title: Grand Hotel
recommendations.overview: Guests at a posh Berlin hotel struggle through worry, scandal, and heartache.

recommendations.title: Sex and the City
recommendations.overview: A New York writer on sex and love is finally getting married to her Mr. Big. But her three best girlfriends must console her after one of them inadvertently leads Mr. Big to jilt her.

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.

recommendations.title: The Illusionist
recommendations.overview: With his eye on a lovely aristocrat, a gifted illusionist named Eisenheim uses his powers to win her away from her betrothed, a crown prince. But Eisenheim's scheme creates tumult within the monarchy and ignites the suspicion of a dogged inspector.

recommendations.title: Ehrengard: The Art of Seduction
recommendations.overview: When a self-appointed expert on love tries to teach a timid prince the art of seduction, the plan backfires, leading to scandal — and unexpected romance.

recommendations.title: Falcon Lake
recommendations.overview: A shy teenager on a summer vacation experiences the joy and pain of young adulthood when he forges an unlikely bond with an older girl.
